name: libcommon-sense-perl
title: libcommon-sense-perl
summary: module that implements some sane defaults for Perl programs
description:
module that implements some sane defaults for Perl programs
common::sense implements some sane defaults for Perl programs, as defined by
two typical (or not so typical - use your common sense) specimens of Perl
coders.

When validating lab setup, run `libcommon-sense-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
